about.title: About Me
about.bio: I've been programming since age 14, starting with fractals and generative art. My journey includes 3D modeling, music production, and the intersection of technology and creativity.
about.music: Music has been a passion since childhood. I studied classical piano in music school, transitioned to electric guitar, and now focus on jazz piano. I perform with my university jazz ensemble and compose original music.
about.album: Currently working on my debut electronic music album.
about.passion: I'm fascinated by the intersection of code and creativity—whether that's algorithms generating visual patterns or tools for music production.

timeline.title: Started at age 5
timeline.desc: Vocal and choir lessons at music school

timeline.title: First Programs
timeline.desc: Explored beauty of programming and math

timeline.title: Art School
timeline.desc: Transitioned from tennis to art school, studing paintings

timeline.title: University
timeline.desc: Started studying Computer Science at Russian Technological University (Moscow Institute of Radio, Electronics and Automatics

timeline.title: First full time job
timeline.desc: Started working as a software developer at Main Science-Informational-Computational Centre (GNIVC)

projects.name: Fractal Generator
projects.description: Interactive web-based fractal visualization tool built with Canvas API

projects.name: ASCII Generator
projects.description: WebGL-based 3D modeling viewer with custom shader effects

projects.name: Music functions generator
projects.description: Synthesis from waveforms of mathematical functions

music.title: Music
music.subtitle: Original compositions and experimental electronic music
music.about: I'm currently working on my debut album, blending electronic production with jazz influences and live instrumentation. The project explores possibility of experimental pop music.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.message: Feel free to reach out about collaborations, music projects, or just to chat about programming and music!
